name: QUOTES_DAILY
text:
CREATE OR REPLACE MATERIALIZED VIEW QUOTES_DAILY
CLUSTER BY (sym, day)
AS
SELECT
    sym,
    TO_DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(t, 3))  AS day,
    COUNT(*)        AS n_quotes,
    MIN(bp)         AS bp_min,
    MAX(bp)         AS bp_max,
    MIN(ap)         AS ap_min,
    MAX(ap)         AS ap_max,
    SUM(bs)         AS bs_sum,
    SUM("AS")       AS as_sum,
    SUM(ap - bp)    AS spread_sum
FROM QUOTES
GROUP BY sym, TO_DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(t, 3));

    TO_DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(t, 3))  AS day,

    MIN(ap)         AS ap_min,
    MAX(ap)         AS ap_max,
    SUM(bs)         AS bs_sum,
    SUM("AS")       AS as_sum,
    SUM(ap - bp)    AS spread_sum
FROM QUOTES
GROUP BY sym, TO_DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(t, 3));
